params.name: id
params.description: This is the unique identifier for the session to filter by.

params.name: name
params.description: This is the name of the session to filter by.

params.name: assistantId
params.description: This is the ID of the assistant to filter sessions by.

params.name: assistantIdAny
params.description: Filter by multiple assistant IDs. Provide as comma-separated values.

params.name: squadId
params.description: This is the ID of the squad to filter sessions by.

params.name: workflowId
params.description: This is the ID of the workflow to filter sessions by.

params.name: numberE164CheckEnabled
params.description:
This is the flag to toggle the E164 check for the `number` field. This is an advanced property which should be used if you know your use case requires it.

Use cases:
- `false`: To allow non-E164 numbers like `+001234567890`, `1234`, or `abc`. This is useful for dialing out to non-E164 numbers on your SIP trunks.
- `true` (default): To allow only E164 numbers like `+14155551234`. This is standard for PSTN calls.

If `false`, the `number` is still required to only contain alphanumeric characters (regex: `/^\+?[a-zA-Z0-9]+$/`).

@default true (E164 check is enabled)

params.name: extension
params.description: This is the extension that will be dialed after the call is answered.

params.name: assistantOverrides
params.description:
These are the overrides for the assistant's settings and template variables specific to this customer.
This allows customization of the assistant's behavior for individual customers in batch calls.

params.name: number
params.description: This is the number of the customer.

params.name: sipUri
params.description: This is the SIP URI of the customer.

params.name: email
params.description: This is the email of the customer.

params.name: externalId
params.description: This is the external ID of the customer.

params.name: customerNumberAny
params.description: Filter by any of the specified customer phone numbers (comma-separated).

params.name: phoneNumberId
params.description: This will return sessions with the specified phoneNumberId.

params.name: phoneNumberIdAny
params.description: This will return sessions with any of the specified phoneNumberIds.

params.name: page
params.description: This is the page number to return. Defaults to 1.

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: This is the sort order for pagination. Defaults to 'DESC'.

params.name: sortBy
params.description: This is the column to sort by. Defaults to 'createdAt'.

params.name: limit
params.description: This is the maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 100.

params.name: createdAtGt
params.description: This will return items where the createdAt is greater than the specified value.

params.name: createdAtLt
params.description: This will return items where the createdAt is less than the specified value.

params.name: createdAtGe
params.description: This will return items where the createdAt is greater than or equal to the specified value.

params.name: createdAtLe
params.description: This will return items where the createdAt is less than or equal to the specified value.

params.name: updatedAtGt
params.description: This will return items where the updatedAt is greater than the specified value.

params.name: updatedAtLt
params.description: This will return items where the updatedAt is less than the specified value.

params.name: updatedAtGe
params.description: This will return items where the updatedAt is greater than or equal to the specified value.

params.name: updatedAtLe
params.description: This will return items where the updatedAt is less than or equal to the specified value.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier for the resource.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier for the resource.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier for the resource.
